name: Delicious Filled Dental Bites Beef Flavoured 200g
description: Delicious mini steaks with beef 200gr with over 30 treats, contains Vitamin A, D & E, Plaque control and no added sugar or fat. Crude Protein 6% Crude Fat 1% Crude Fiber 0.5% Crude Ash 0.5% Moisture 18% Only a small percentage of the declared protein will be useful to the pet. Composition: Cereals, Glycerine, Yeasts, Derivates of vegetable origin. Guidelines & warnings: Always supervise when feeding your pet, especially if your pet is unaccustomed to this product. Serve limited amounts initially, excessive use of this product may cause gastric upset. Always ensure a bowl of fresh clean water is available. Should be given on a non-stainable surface as this product may stain. Please refer to the ingredients listing. Complementary pet food for dogs- not a primary feeding product. To be stored in a cool dry condition.
